branding.identity: Edunancial is a financial literacy and financial competency membership platform.
branding.longDescription: Edunancial is a membership platform dedicated to improving financial literacy and financial competency through structured learning resources, interactive tools, practical exercises, and technology-supported methods.
branding.publicDisclaimer: Edunancial is not a school, college, university, vocational institution, accredited educational institution, or degree-granting institution. Membership does not result in an academic degree, diploma, professional license, or regulated educational credential.

latinAmerica.label: Latin America
latinAmerica.title: Latin America: Structure meets opportunity.
latinAmerica.description: Edunancial Latin America is being built for founders and households across Mexico, Colombia, Peru, Argentina, Brazil, Chile, Ecuador, and all of Central and South America. Every curriculum track — RED, WHITE, and BLUE — will be fully localized in Spanish and Portuguese.
latinAmerica.launchPriority.1: Informality to structure: unlocking capital and protection
latinAmerica.launchPriority.2: Currency risk, political dynamics, and planning discipline
latinAmerica.launchPriority.3: Business formation in Mexico, Colombia, Argentina, and Brazil
latinAmerica.launchPriority.4: Cross-border expansion across Spanish and Portuguese markets
latinAmerica.markets.mexico.detail: North America's gateway to Latin commerce and business culture.
latinAmerica.markets.colombia.detail: Fast-growing startup ecosystem and entrepreneurial energy.
latinAmerica.markets.brazil.detail: Largest economy in Latin America with Portuguese-language content.
latinAmerica.markets.argentina.detail: Resilient entrepreneurship in complex economic conditions.
latinAmerica.markets.peru.detail: Emerging markets, informality transitions, and capital access.
latinAmerica.markets.centralAmerica.deta: Guatemala, Honduras, El Salvador, Nicaragua, Costa Rica, Panama.
footer.identity: Edunancial is a financial literacy and financial competency membership platform.
footer.subtitle: Financial competency is built through disciplined action.
footer.learn.title: Learn
footer.competency.title: Competency
footer.company.title: Company
footer.community.title: Community
footer.legal.title: Trust & Legal
footer.disclaimer: Edunancial is not a school, college, university, vocational institution, accredited educational institution, or degree-granting institution. Membership does not result in an academic degree, diploma, professional license, or regulated educational credential. Edunancial provides informational content only — not financial, investment, tax, accounting, or legal advice.
home.story.label: Our Story
home.story.heading: Why Edunancial?
home.story.paragraphs.1: Edunancial began with a simple question between a father and his son: “How do you work with your head?”
home.story.paragraphs.2: That conversation grew into a system for teaching practical wealth-building across RED for real estate, WHITE for paper assets, and BLUE for business.
home.story.paragraphs.3: Financial literacy gives people vocabulary. Financial competency helps them use that knowledge with disciplined action, measurable progress, and better decision-making.
home.story.paragraphs.4: Our mission is to help members move from theory to practical judgment they can apply for life.
home.story.cards.1.title: Why we exist
home.story.cards.1.body: To turn financial literacy into applied financial competency.
home.story.cards.2.title: The mission
home.story.cards.2.body: Make practical wealth-building knowledge clear, useful, and accessible.
home.story.cards.3.title: The philosophy
home.story.cards.3.body: Financial Literacy → Financial Competency → Disciplined Action → Measurable Progress → Wealth Building.
home.hero.title: What is Edunancial?
home.hero.methods: Edunancial may use structured learning pathways, Socratic questioning, artificial intelligence, repetition, flashcards, quizzes, and practical exercises to help members improve financial literacy and financial competency.
home.hero.badges.1: Invitation-only beta access remains hidden from public pricing
home.hero.badges.2: Color-coded learning paths across Red, White, and Blue
home.hero.badges.3: AI-guided next steps for better decisions

home.dashboard.heading: Navigate every major area in two clicks or less

home.dashboard.cards.6.title: Books
home.dashboard.cards.6.body: Explore books, workbooks, and supporting learning resources.
home.dashboard.cards.7.title: Community
home.dashboard.cards.7.body: Stay connected with other learners, families, and builders.
